Best AI chatbots and helpdesks for Shopify

Compared by fit, pricing model, and Shopify use case.

ToolCategoryPricingBest fit
GorgiasCustomer supportPaidStrong Shopify fit for support teams handling order, return, and product questions.
TidioCustomer supportFreemiumGood starter chatbot for pre-sale questions and lead capture.
IntercomCustomer supportPaidUseful for stores with higher-ticket products and consultative pre-sale questions.
Re:amazeCustomer supportPaidA compact Shopify-friendly support hub with chat, email, and automation.
Zendesk AICustomer supportPaidBetter for larger support teams than early solo operators.
StoreAI Stack

Independent editorial directory for Shopify AI tools. Some links may be affiliate links.
